## Checklist (for engine PRs)

- [ ] My engine lives in `engines/<my-name>/` and nothing outside it changed
- [ ] `name`, `author`, and `league` are set (and the name is unique)
- [ ] `python tools/check_imports.py engines` passes locally
- [ ] `python -m grokchess.tournament -v` runs and my engine plays
